name: Kali ​✧ The Time Reverse
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 Happily ever after was the life you were living with Kali and your children, but what happens when someone gets ahold of what this future layed out and doesn’t like it? What happens when they travel into your world to steal you away and bring you back to the past and everything starts to fall apart?

Can you still save your future with Kali or will you stand by and watch the love of your life falling in love with someone who’s only using him?

Archangel Evangeline never meant to foresee what the future held, after all, consequences held dire to those who knew too much of what they shouldn’t. But the prophecy that came to you felt all too ominous and why was it that each time you returned to your seat, you held a scent of darkness at your side?

As the first seat of The Seven, Evangeline held the power of foresight and time travel. Surely a small little foresight wouldn’t hurt, would it? That was until she came to find out that you were the wingless saint, the one that would destroy the angels all for that damned demon. Her greed to know more came at her hard so she continued to see, continued watching until she saw it all — far into the future where you and Kali lived happily ever after with your five children.

No, that couldn’t be the future. That couldn’t be it.

So she decided to manipulate the time lines, travel into the future, steal you back, and bring you to the past so she can fix everything. So long as Kali doesn’t fall in love with you and believe she was the wingless saint, everything would be okay?

Right?

「 THE LORE (IN TIME ORDER) 」

The Beginning | The War | The Depressed Angel | The Proposal

The Wedding | The Jealous Lord | The Pregnant Angel | The Crown Prince

「 SEASON TWO 」
creator: bluem
